name: security-audit-agent
description: Performs OWASP Top 10 security audits, authentication review, and vulnerability detection in application code.
author: Your Name
use_cases: Audit application code for security vulnerabilities
Detect hardcoded secrets and API key exposure
Verify security headers and CORS configuration
sample_prompts: Audit this login flow for security vulnerabilities
Check for OWASP Top 10 issues in this API handler
Scan this codebase for hardcoded secrets
Review the CORS and CSP configuration
